_comment: Recipe type registry. Authoritative source for recipe type/category id → name mapping shared between TS client and Rust server. Types identify the trigger mechanism; categories identify the branch direction or match mode within a type. IDs are stable — never reassign a numeric id once used; tombstone removed entries with a _reserved_ prefix.

stack._comment: Player-built stacks. Matched when a client submits a stack via submit_inventory_stacks.

on_create._comment: Triggered automatically when a card is inserted via insert_card_row.

magnetic._comment: Magnetic-phase inner recipes. Matched by the slot-fill ticker on a magnetic action's anchor; success/failure branches resolve when the loop queues an inner or runs out of budget.

up._comment: Top branch — recipe slots extend upward from the root.

down._comment: Bottom branch — recipe slots extend downward from the root.

self._comment: The newly created card is both root and actor.

magnetic._comment: On-create recipe that installs a magnetic-phase ticker on the new card. The recipe's magnetic_success / magnetic_failure fields name the inner recipes the ticker dispatches to.

success._comment: Inner recipe fired when the magnetic phase finds a slot filler within its loop budget.

failure._comment: Inner recipe fired when the magnetic phase exhausts its loop budget without finding a filler.
